error_signature: incomplete response body without hydra data
title: Incomplete response body from Hydra API
symptom: When querying a Hydra API, the response body does not include hydra data, leading to incomplete pagination information.
not_this_if: Response includes hydra data in Postman
root_cause: The API can return data in different formats, and the default format may not include the hydra metadata necessary for pagination. The correct format must be specified in the request headers to retrieve the complete response.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings
Add 'Accept: application/ld+json' to the header parameters
agent_instruction: Set the Accept header to 'application/ld+json' in the HTTP Request node.
